original_hypothesis.title: Genesis.withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized Can Drain Unclaimed Agent Tokens
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized allows DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (the FGenesis factory, controlled by ADMIN_ROLE) to withdraw ANY ERC20 token from the Genesis contract after finalization, including the agentTokenAddress. There is no check that the withdrawal amount preserves enough tokens to cover outstanding claimableAgentTokens. Admin can drain all unclaimed agent tokens before users claim them.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The function has no logic to protect reserved tokens. The balance check only ensures the contract HAS the tokens, not that it's keeping enough for unclaimed users. This is a code-level defect since the function should exclude committed tokens.

proof_of_signal.pattern: No check against sum(claimableAgentTokens); allows withdrawing agentTokenAddress balance below committed claims

preconditions: Genesis finalized successfully with agent tokens distributed to claimableAgentTokens
DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE holder calls withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized with token=agentTokenAddress
Users haven't claimed their tokens yet

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: Unrestricted token withdrawal including committed claim tokens
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: require(amount <= IERC20(token).balanceOf(address(this))) allows draining ALL tokens including those reserved for claims
initial_code_evidence.missing_safeguards: Should check: for agentTokenAddress, amount <= balance - sum(claimableAgentTokens)

analysis_questions: Who controls DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on Genesis (FGenesis factory)?
Who controls ADMIN_ROLE on FGenesis (can call withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized)?
Is there any time delay or multi-sig requirement?
validation_requirements: Set up successful genesis, withdraw agentTokenAddress, verify user claims revert
Verify no protection against withdrawing committed tokens

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: After successful genesis, admin calls FGenesis.withdrawLeftAssetsAfterFinalized(genesisId, adminAddr, agentTokenAddress, totalBalance). All agent tokens are drained. Users calling claimAgentToken get reverts.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Complete loss of all unclaimed genesis agent tokens
potential_impact_if_confirmed.affected_users: All genesis participants who haven't claimed
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Admin would need to return tokens manually

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test verifying withdrawal protects committed claim amounts

technical_investigation_focus.detection_analysis: Detectable by monitoring AssetsWithdrawn events for agentTokenAddress

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
